task_description: Complete pipeline wiring with input validation. Add a Validate Input Choice state to the Step Functions state machine that checks for required S3 event fields and valid audio file extensions. Reorder the pipeline flow to: WriteMetadata -> Validate Input -> Process Audio (Lambda with validation) -> Polly -> UpdateStatus -> NotifySuccess -> Done. Invalid inputs route to failure path. Update Lambda handler with validation logic. Update ARCHITECTURE.md.

verification.summary: All 47 tests pass (8 new tests total). CDK synth succeeds. FEAT-003 addressed semantic review findings: inserted Set Validation Error Pass state, fixed extensionless filename handling, added env var placeholder comments.
